case_title: THUY NGA LE ET AL VS. ALMA MARIE HEYMAN

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-13-2021 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-13-2021 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF THUY NGA LE IS NOT PRESENT BUT SPEAKING ON HER BEHALF IS KRISS MIRANDA, PROPERTY MANAGER. PLAINTIFF TRANG T. LEE IS PRESENT ASSISTED BY WITNESS WESLY MATA. DEFENDANT ALMA MARIE HEYMAN IS NOT PRESENT. HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG ALLOWS THE PROPERTY MANAGER TO SPEAK ON THE PLAINTIFF THUY NGA LEE'S BEHALF PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $100) SERVED AUG-24-2021, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT HEYMAN, ALMA MARIE
REMARK: EXHIBITS FOR PLANTIFF RECD IN DROP BOX 10/6/21
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-13-2021 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LE, THUY NGA LE, TRANG T. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT HEYMAN, ALMA MARIE THE SECURITY DEPOSIT THAT WAS WITHHELD OF $1000.00 COMPENSATES PLAINTIFF FOR THE REPAIRS MADE TO THE UNIT UPON DEFENDANT DEPARTURE. NO ADDITIONAL MONEY IS AWARDED TO THE PLAINTIFF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
(SC-109)AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR KRISS MIRANDA TO APPEAR ON BEHALF OF THUY NGA LE FILED BY PLAINTIFF LE, THUY NGA

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,427.29 FILED BY LE, THUY NGA LE, TRANG T. AS TO DEFENDANT HEYMAN, ALMA MARIE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-13-2021 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
